name: @agent-desktop-harness/core
description: Core engine for isolated desktop sessions, evidence, input, screenshots, and visual handoff.

scripts.test: pnpm build && node --test dist/session/displayAllocator.test.js dist/policy/PolicyValidator.test.js dist/evidence/EvidenceStore.test.js dist/input/XdotoolInputBackend.test.js dist/window/WmctrlWindowBackend.test.js dist/session/SessionManager.input.test.js
